---
title: "Redirecting..."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://fantastical.app/jonathantemplin/meet-jonathan">
page-navigation: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
  window.location.replace("https://fantastical.app/jonathantemplin/meet-jonathan");
</script>
```

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here to schedule a meeting](https://fantastical.app/jonathantemplin/meet-jonathan).
